description: New public API endpoint added without any documentation updates to README or API docs

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/api/routes.py b/src/api/routes.py
index 1a2b3c4..e5f6a7b 100644
--- a/src/api/routes.py
+++ b/src/api/routes.py
@@ -15,6 +15,22 @@ from .auth import require_auth
 from .models import User, Order
 from .schemas import OrderSchema
 
+@app.route('/api/v2/orders/bulk', methods=['POST'])
+@require_auth
+def create_bulk_orders():
+    """Create multiple orders in a single request."""
+    payload = request.get_json()
+    orders = payload.get('orders', [])
+    if len(orders) > 100:
+        return jsonify({'error': 'Max 100 orders per batch'}), 400
+    results = []
+    for order_data in orders:
+        schema = OrderSchema()
+        order = schema.load(order_data)
+        db.session.add(order)
+        results.append(order.id)
+    db.session.commit()
+    return jsonify({'created': results}), 201
